.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Update the CI Docker image from an old OpenJDK 11 image to Eclipse Temurin 21 Alpine to support the target JDK version.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The old image 'circleci/openjdk:11-ea-28-jdk' is deprecated/removed and does not provide JDK 21, causing build failures or inability to run on the target JDK.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Add explicit installation of Maven via apk because the new Alpine-based image does not include it by default.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The 'eclipse-temurin:21-alpine' image is minimal and lacks the 'mvn' command, causing 'command not found' errors during the build step.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Add explicit installation of make via apk to support build steps requiring it in the new Alpine environment.
.circleci/config.yml.why_exists: The 'eclipse-temurin:21-alpine' image is minimal and lacks the 'make' command, which may be required by the project's build process.

itf-chartizate-api/pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit maven-compiler-plugin configuration block from the build plugins section.
Remove the 'provided' scope from the Lombok dependency, likely to allow it to be included in the runtime classpath or rely on default compile scope.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 11, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce compatibility with the target runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add version property for the new omni-coveragereporter-maven-plugin.
